name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    name: CI
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version-file: .nvmrc

      - name: Cache node modules
        id: cacheNodeModules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: '**/node_modules'
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cacheNodeModules2-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/package.json') }}
          restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-cacheNodeModules2-

      - name: Install build tools
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          sudo apt update -y
          sudo apt install -y build-essential pkg-config libx11-dev libx11-xcb-dev libxkbfile-dev libnotify-bin libkrb5-dev

      - name: execute `npm ci` (1)
        if: ${{ steps.cacheNodeModules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true' }}
        env:
          PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD: 1
          ELECTRON_SKIP_BINARY_DOWNLOAD: 1
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Download Playwright
        run: npx playwright install --with-deps

      - name: execute `npm ci` (2)
        if: ${{ steps.cacheNodeModules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true' }}

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    gnupg \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    libx11-dev \
    libx11-xcb-dev \
    libxkbfile-dev \
    libnotify-bin \
    libkrb5-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Node.js 22.21.1
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs=22.21.1-1nodesource1 && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Verify Node.js installation
RUN node --version && npm --version

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

# Set environment variables
ENV PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD=1
ENV ELECTRON_SKIP_BINARY_DOWNLOAD=1

# Install npm dependencies
RUN npm ci
RUN npm ci --prefix webpack-plugin

# Install Playwright with dependencies
RUN npx playwright install --with-deps

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
